subcodes.first_line: Hearken thou unto the call of the Beloved at the time when He turned His face toward distant lands of exile and was wronged by the swine of tyranny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمعی ندآء الحبیب حین الذی توجه الی دیار هجر بعیدا و ظلموه خنازیر الظلم الی ان
subcodes.subjects: @Imam Husayn, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @consolation and comfort
